title: Cobblemon Fakemon: Lively 'Mons
description: A Cobblemon Addon adding 70+ Custom Fakemon, including new regional variants, rideable Pokemon, and convergent forms.
body:
![Render](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KLxbNxCP/images/360d488aef62980db16974dc4b7777176ef7cd0c.png)

# Welcome to Lively 'Mons

Lively 'Mons is a Cobblemon addon that adds Fakemon all designed, modeled, animated, and implemented by me (Captain Nautilus)

Lively 'Mons currently holds Pokemon from the Sanrosa region, based on real-world California, although I plan to add some from other regions as well.

## How to Install

Keep in mind that the datapack version of this addon needs to be put in both your datapack and resourcepack folder.

1) Mod Version: Add the file to your modpack and you're ready to go! (In multiplayer all players need to install the mod)
   
1) Datapack Version: Add the .zip file from whatever version you want and add it to your world's datapack folder your resourcepacks folder.

If nothing gets added something is wrong with the datapack folder. If there is something added but it looks like a substitute and the name is all weird then something is wrong with the resourcepacks folder.

### How to make the starters work
If you want to be able to choose the starters in the starter menu then follow these steps:

1) In the Cobblemon config turn on "exportstarterconfig" to be true. Then, restart your game.

2) After restarting, inside of Cobblemon go into your resourcepacks folder and click "Open Pack Folder" on the bottom left. This is the same way you add new resourcepacks into minecraft.

3) On the top bar it should have the word "resourcepacks" and to the left of it separates by a ">", and then the name of your pack like maybe "cobblemon" or if your using regular minecraft, just "minecraft" click the name of your pack.

4) Now there should be a folder called "starters.json" go into it. Now at the top of that folder, turn "useConfigStarters": true. You do not need to make any other changes to this file.

5) Reload your game and you should be all ready to go!

## For Use on Servers

I am completely fine with this pack being used in any way in private servers with friends. When it comes to public servers, I have a strict policy of not allowing any of my designs to be rewards for pay to win systems, especially ones that involve gambling. If you find any public server breaking this policy please report it on my support channel.

<details>
<summary>Budabon</summary>
  
![Budabon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4c4f4577d35b6a7993815efbb55f58de0f8f49e.png)

- **Budabon**
    - Budabon is a special Pokemon that has a different regional variant for every region. There is also an achievment for catching them all so if you want to go for that here are all the forms and their spawn locations.
    - Type: Grass
    - Spawns (All can be boosted with a sapling nearby): 
        - Kantonian (Strawberry) Floral Biomes
        - Johtonian (Mandarin) Biomes with Birch
        - Hoennian (Mango) Jungle Treetops
        - Sinnohan (Cantaloupe) Freezing Biomes not on Mountains
        - Unovan (Apple) Villages
        - Kalosian (Grape) Hilly Biomes
        - Alolan (Pineapple) Warm Beaches
        - Galarian (Blackberry) Ruins
        - Hisuian (Pumpkin) Spooky Biomes
        - Paldean (Olive) Savannas
        - Sanrosan (Prickly Pear) Sandy Biomes, not including Beaches

</details>

<details>
<summary>Budabon Crossovers</summary>

![Budabon Crossovers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae0a61b4f6b9ae57915f967c2deba607d8697cfa.png)

- **Budabon**
    - Unlike the other forms of Budabon, these require other Fakemon packs to appear and they are from the regions of those Fakemon packs.
    - Type: Grass
    - Spawns (All can be boosted with a sapling nearby): 
        - Lumoran (Starfruit) Magical Biomes and requires Stellar Blue by Kenji_64
        - Laser (Glowberry) Lush Caves and requires Laser's Fakemon by Lasercraft
        - Alatian (Tomato) Jungle Floor and requires Alatia by Doxtor_X
        - Jetian (Onion) In the Overworld near Alliums and requires Grow and Gather by Jet

If you are a Cobblemon addon creator and want to add your own Budabon form, contact me on Discord.


</details>

Also, with /spawnnpc you can fight my team and Saucecoie's team (He's the balancer).

## Credits:

Currently all of the fakemon are designed by me

Saucecoie did all of the balancing for competetive and coded many of the custom abilities and all of the custom moves.

The Simplified Chinese Translation is made by Yve.Jekyll (If you know a certain language and want to help with translations feel free to do so)

Thanks to all of the amazing people on the Cobblemon team for their mod and some of their assets which were used to make this pack. Their creation has made Lively 'Mons possible and their discord server helped me so much when making this. Literally none of Lively 'Mons would be possible without them.
